MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-25-2009 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN SAMEANKUL'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART THE WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. THE COURT GRANTED THE WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AND PER DIEM FEES. THE COURT DENIED THE WAIVER FOR COURT APPOINTED INTERPRETERS' FEES. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN CSR #4780 (D206)
